flags.message: high_yield is excluded from main Deep ML research models because it starts too late.
flags.professor_safe_note: This protects the main study from short-history bias.

flags.message: Some factors are manual CSV factors and must be tracked explicitly in live mode.
flags.professor_safe_note: Manual factors are allowed only when their valid-through dates are visible.

professor_safe_summary: Data flags are advisory in official research mode and protective in live market update mode.
